Render a <mesa> specification to a {gt} table

Source: R/table-render.R
as_gt.Rd

as_gt() realizes a mesa() specification: it resolves the recorded selection against the model table, decorates each estimate with its term metadata, and emits a {gt} table. On a bare specification it renders a minimal default – each displayed term's point estimate and 95% confidence interval, with adjustment sets on rows and outcomes as row groups.

Usage

as_gt(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'mesa'
as_gt(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A <mesa> specification (from mesa())

...

Passed to methods

Value

A gt_tbl object.

See also

mesa()

On this page
